Records.authors: Bonetti, Marco, Panzer, Erik, Smirnov, Vladimir A., Tancredi, Lorenzo
Records.description: Planar integral family PL for two-loop mixed QCD-EW corrections to $gg \to Hg$. Quark box (massless propagators $D_1,D_3,D_4,D_5,D_6$) with two massive vector-boson propagators ($D_2,D_7$) coupling to the Higgs. 9 denominators (7 propagators + 2 ISPs: $D_8=(l-p_1)^2$, $D_9=(l-p_1-p_2)^2$). 45 planar master integrals. Kinematics: $s=(p_1+p_2)^2$, $t=(p_1+p_3)^2$, $u=(p_2+p_3)^2$, $s+t+u=m_h^2$; $p_1^2=p_2^2=p_3^2=0$, $p_4^2=m_h^2$. Paper label: PL. Defined in Table 1 and eq. (2.4).
Records.familyName: 2-loop 4-point planar with 2 massive vector-boson propagators (gg->Hg QCD-EW)

Records.authors: Becchetti, Matteo, Moriello, Francesco, Schweitzer, Armin
Records.description: Planar two-loop integral family for the mixed QCD-electroweak corrections to gg -> Hg, with 7 propagators (5 massless, 2 massive with mass mV) and 2 irreducible scalar products. The 48 master integrals satisfy a canonical system of differential equations with a 25-letter alphabet involving 4 square roots. The MIs are expressible in terms of multiple polylogarithms and were computed analytically in arXiv:1805.10235. This paper provides an independent numerical evaluation via generalized power series expansions, with ancillary files for the DE matrices, boundary conditions, and amplitude form factors compatible with DiffExp.

Names: 2-loop 4-point planar with 2 massive vector-boson propagators (gg->Hg QCD-EW)
